name: Sensus Healthcare, Inc.
summary: Overview Sensus Healthcare, Inc. (together, with its subsidiaries, Sensus Medical Devices Ltd. and Sensus Healthcare Services, LLC, unless the context otherwise indicates, Sensus, we, us, our, or the Company) is a medical device company committed to providing highly effective, non-invasive treatments for non-melanoma skin cancer (NMSC) and post-surgical keloid scar prevention. The Company uses a proprietary low-energy X-ray technology known as superficial radiation therapy (SRT), which is based ...
